ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR, TE, RB) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current head coach */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary scout */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., WR, TE, RB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., Regular, Preseason, Postseason) */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "rec" INTEGER /* Receptions made by the player */,
  "yds" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Average yards per reception */,
  "td" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kick returns by the player */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns by the player */,
  "special_teams_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in special teams plays */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "renovated_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was last renovated */,
  "stadium_url" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "previous_team" TEXT /* Previous team the coach managed */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the scout belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the scout covers */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scout's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scout's tenure */,
  "area_of_expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "notable_discoveries" TEXT /* Notable players discovered by the scout */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a scout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Scout, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "contract_extension" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transfer included a contract extension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ACL tear, concussion) */,
  "recovery_period" TEXT /* Recovery period (e.g., 4 weeks, 8 weeks) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., Recovered, Out for the season) */,
  "injured_body_part" TEXT /* Specific body part injured (e.g., Knee, Shoulder) */,
  "last_game_played" TEXT /* Date of the last game played before the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., Active, Expired, Terminated) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Rookie, Veteran) */,
  "guaranteed_money" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* JSON object containing contract incentives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
